title: Bylina: Dobrynya and the Dragon
description: The bogatyr Dobrynya fights the dragon Zmey Gorynych to save a captive princess.
introduction: The bogatyr Dobrynya fights the dragon Zmey Gorynych to save a captive princess.

translation.text: Dobrynya rode to the Puchai River and saw the twelve-headed serpent Zmey Gorynych rising from the water.
